steps.title: Use density formula
steps.content: Density is mass divided by volume. Use mass $8.10$ grams, then find the cube's volume from its edge length.

steps.title: Find the cube volume
steps.content:
The edge length is $3.00$ centimeters, so the volume is
$$(3.00)^3=27.00$$

steps.title: Divide mass by volume
steps.content: Calculate the density. $$\frac{8.10}{27.00}=0.30$$ The answer is 0.30.
